news.title: Apple seeks approval to buy chips from blacklisted Chinese company, FT reports
news.summary: Apple is lobbying the Trump administration for clearance to buy memory chips from ChangXin ‌Memory Technologies, a Chinese company the Pentagon has ‌put on a blacklist, the Financial Times reported on Friday.  The iPhone maker ​has lobbied the White House for approval aimed at easing financial pressure on the company from rising memory chip prices, the newspaper said, citing unnamed sources.  The White House, Apple and ‌CXMT did not respond ⁠to requests for comment from Reuters outside business hours.
